summary: Dra. Carmen Valdez. Project: commercial_health_center in La Paz, BCS. Key program: 10 consultorios, urgencias, laboratorio, farmacia, rayos-X, enfermería — total approx. 1,500 sqm. Special features: medical gas systems, specialized HVAC, backup generator. Budget: $1.8M USD stated. Design engagement: group médico client, detailed program and budget signal provided.
